message:
Running command: # The step config says it was made by librelane 3.0.2 with step 'OpenROAD.DumpRCValues'
# But we're NOW running librelane 2.4.6! Step names might differ between versions.
# Check what steps librelane 2.4.6 knows about
librelane --pdk-root /nc/pdk --pdk sky130A --list-steps 2>&1 | grep -i "dump\|rc\|DumpRC" | head -5
echo "---all openroad steps---"
librelane --pdk-root /nc/pdk --pdk sky130A --list-steps 2>&1 | grep -i "openroad" | head -20
